scripts.build:app: cd packages/main && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:flow: cd packages/spark-flow && npm run build && cd ..
scripts.build:subtree:java: npm run build:subtree && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run build:flow && npm run setup -w main && BACK_END=java npm run build:app
scripts.build:subtree:python: npm run build:subtree && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run build:flow && npm run setup -w main && BACK_END=python npm run build:app
scripts.clear: rm -rf node_modules packages/spark-flow/node_modules packages/main/node_modules packages/main/src/.umi package-lock.json
scripts.re-install: npm run clear && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run build:flow && npm run setup -w main
scripts.re-install:flow: npm run build:flow && rm -rf packages/main/node_modules && npm install --ignore-scripts && npm run setup -w main
